DISCOVERY, 301, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL BARR AN INDIVIDUAL MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS. THE MOTION TO QUASH A DEPOSITION SUBPOENA ISSUED TO KIERSTEN MARIE BARR IS DENIED. THE SUBPOENA WAS ISSUED PURSUANT TO AN ORDER OF A COURT OF ANOTHER STATE. THIS COURT HAS NO AUTHORITY TO REVIEW THE ACTIONS OF THE WASHINGTON COURTS. THE COURT EXPRESSES NO VIEW OF THE MERITS OF THE MOTION TO QUASH. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHELE RONSEN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Off calendar. Notice of Settlement of Entire Case filed.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL BARR AN INDIVIDUAL MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS

The motion to quash a deposition subpoena issued to Kiersten Marie Barr is denied. The subpoena was issued pursuant to an order of a court of another state. This court has no authority to review the actions of the Washington courts. The court expresses no view of the merits of the motion to quash.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2025 Set For Trial On Feb-17-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
